item.title: Gold tier shitposting
item.description: The eyes are really just *chef's kiss* Shamelessly stolen from Instagram so you don't have to go there. Found the OP after some digging. His IG accounts are fiefdom_design and fiefdom_fashion. This specific reel isn't on either account from what I can find. He sells these on his etsy fiefdom_design, he's based in Sydney, don't know if he does international or sells the pattern.
item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: Crave the moonlight. Crave it. Whisper it's name. Yearn for it's soft, loving, yet alien glow. Crave it. ACE hardware, now open late!
item.dc:creator: algavinn

item.title: It's an intense process!
item.description: Sadly I don't know the sauce. EDIT: Thanks for the upvotes, Imgurians! Remember to properly exercise and be awesome to each other! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
no thanks
fair
accurate
again
looks painful
mfers do be saying that
now there's an idea
i didnt crop the price out.. think its $1,225.00 - seems reasonable
let's go
this is dedicated to my haterz
over share much?
i have absolutely zero idea what that is supposed to mean
no
mmm hmm
pigeon nest, obviously
i like this for some reason
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #343
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: Hit my 40lbs down mark
item.description: I haven't shared with anyone about this but I finally hit 40lbs down and it's a good feeling to have. Worked out 3x a week, switched to a keto diet, better sleep, and became more active. Still have a way to go but it's nice to see the stomach go down.
item.dc:creator: CarcosMonster

item.title: Memes and things vol 129
item.description:
Nah.
I love Polly Pockets. All my compact ones were stolen years ago and I wish I still had them. I want them back so badly.
The pickle.
Katie-Lee for president.
So friggin cute. I want to kiss him.
Nubbin tax!!!

item.title: Images of Note: befuddled by the grain.
item.description:
Me off my tits out in the woods on a bender.
Genuinely confused, which one is the Cybertruck?
On the 22nd of June 1960, Henderson's department store in Liverpool burnt down. August that same year, The Beatles went to Hamburg. In 1962 Paul McCartney and Steve Best were deported from Germany for Arson. I rest my case. /jk for legal reasons.
F A L L
HELL YEAH
This must've been a wild night for the frog
HELL YES
DO NOT FEEL BAD FOR THEM, THEY ARE A NOTORIOUS MURDERER
Already seen r34 of this. Y'all are sick fucks.
This is why God abandoned us.
O _O
Can confirm, Proots are best.
When they say "I want a small government" they mean they want a government that exclusively exists to punish and harm people.
beep
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky
